[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 1111111111 a
4 1111111111 a
5 1111111111 a
6 1111111111 a
7 1110001111 7

01 1111111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
12 0111010011 6
23 1110111100 7
34 0011110111 7
45 1111111101 9
56 1011111010 7
67 1111110111 9
70 1110001111 7 match 7

13 1111011100 7

35 0111111111 9
46 1111111000 7

71 1110101111 8

01 12x

70 67x
